room.caption: [G6-WindJ] On the topic of birds, I'd like someone who is reading this to draw me summoning forth birds... lots of them.

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=688 newMapY=288 toRoom=rGame6_WindI
sprite_index=sWarpGateStand bShowArrow=false exitType=0 newMapX=144 newMapY=992 toRoom=rGame6_WindA y+=32
sprite_index=sG6_Crystal image_speed=0.15 image_blend=make_color_rgb(0,150,20) depth=10 if global.gameProgress>=3640 {instance_destroy()}
